formations.descricao: Studying Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science at GRAN College, currently in the 4th Period. Developing skills in programming, software engineering, operating systems and computer architecture, with a focus on building innovative technological solutions.

Computer Network Technician from CEEP - José Figueiredo Barreto, developed skills in IT infrastructure, digital security, hardware and network maintenance, as well as skills in interpersonal relationships and labor standards.
Technician in Maintenance and Computer Support from the renowned Federal Institute of Sergipe – IFS. Training focused on hardware, networking and technical support
